entries.description: Operator answered the UAT/E2E suggested-state prompt: both.
Read the settled verdict, Q8 compat matrix, and Set 087 renderer architecture; routed the required assignment and bounded multi-root assembly decision.
Switched the host snapshot to per-root computeVisibleModules with a pure global merge/payload adapter; added duplicate-name winner payload and one notification per fresh cache cycle.

Deleted the implicit-only flat branch; every repo state now renders module -> bucket -> row with stable testids, muted auto-expanded Default, fallback warnings, and duplicate-name badge/tooltip. Renamed the contributed label to Work Explorer with the view ID unchanged.
Updated Layer 2 source pins, Playwright fixtures, live README/onboarding names, and regenerated the hero screenshot from the Work Explorer mockup.

Focused validation passed: 61 Layer 2 tests, extension compile/typecheck, six initial Layer 3 passes plus repaired stale bucket assertion, manifest-less rerun green, and duplicate-name multi-root Playwright green.

Canonical full pass: Python 2,922 passed / 6 skipped; guidance ceilings OK; TypeScript typecheck + Layer 2 1,413 passed; Layer 3 21 passed after updating stale flat-tree selectors; local 0.41.0 VSIX packaged for armed UAT.
Operator completed and saved the ad-hoc checklist, then explicitly confirmed acceptance: all three substantive Work Explorer UAT walks passed; blank Other rows are optional feedback slots.

After two Anthropic HTTP 400 attempts, the sanctioned remaining-provider fallback ran through the canonical stamped verification pipeline on Google gemini-3-1-pro: VERIFIED, zero findings, two non-blocking nits. This was round 1, before the final ai-assignment actuals write.

Anthropic Opus round 2 restored freshness against the final work state and returned ISSUES_FOUND: one Major inferred that a retained negative Layer 2 client guard contradicted the single-dialect renderer and likely made the suite red.

Inspected the full guard body: the predicted red test was disproven, but its title and negative intent were stale. Replaced it with a positive semantic-input/no-recomputation contract, corrected adjacent legacy-helper wording, and passed the focused 5-test renderer suite plus all 1,413 Layer 2 tests.
Final permitted Anthropic Opus confirmation reviewed the corrected work state: VERIFIED, zero findings. Session 1 verification is terminal and non-blocking.
